games.name: Mr Sniper Hunter Frenzy
games.description: Step into the silent world of precision and power. You are Mr. Sniper, a legendary bald-headed hitman with nerves of steel and eyes like a hawk. In a city drowning in crime and corruption, youre the last line between chaos and control. No backup. No witnesses. Just your rifle, your instincts, and your mission.
games.instructions: mouse only

games.name: Escape Your Birthday: Horror Escape
games.description: A creepy birthday. A locked room. Can you find your way out? You wake up in a strange room. It&amp;rsquo;s your birthday&amp;hellip; but something feels off. There&amp;rsquo;s a cake, a candle, and an eerie silence. This isn&amp;rsquo;t a celebration &amp;mdash; it&amp;rsquo;s a puzzle. And you need to escape. Features: First-person horror puzzle experience Atmospheric sound design &amp;mdash; headphones highly recommended One-room mystery filled with strange objects and hidden clues Short and spooky &amp;mdash; perfect for a coffee break scare
games.instructions: Move WASD Look Mouse Interact Left Mouse Button Unlock cursor ESC

games.name: Jetpack Hero: Ascenso Infinito
games.description: &amp;iexcl;Prep&amp;aacute;rate para volar sin l&amp;iacute;mites en Jetpack Hero: Ascenso Infinito! Ponte en la piel de un valiente h&amp;eacute;roe equipado con un poderoso jetpack y asciende sin descanso hacia lo desconocido. En este juego adictivo y lleno de acci&amp;oacute;n, tu &amp;uacute;nica misi&amp;oacute;n es simple, pero desafiante: sube lo m&amp;aacute;s alto que puedas esquivando obst&amp;aacute;culos, recogiendo potenciadores y dominando el arte del vuelo vertical. Jetpack Hero: Ascenso Infinito es una experiencia r&amp;aacute;pida, fluida y tremendamente entretenida donde cada partida es una nueva oportunidad para romper tu propio r&amp;eacute;cord. Conforme asciendes, el entorno se vuelve m&amp;aacute;s hostil: plataformas m&amp;oacute;viles, rayos l&amp;aacute;ser, torreta

games.description: Test your knowledge of the Dragon Ball universe with Dragon Ball Quiz Master! Dive into a series of challenging questions that cover everything from iconic characters and epic battles to memorable moments and hidden trivia.

games.name: Celebrity Couple Red Carpet Fashion
games.description: Welcome to Celebrity Couple Red Carpet Fashion. A Celebrity couple was invited to a Hollywood award function. They are excited to join this event. At this event, all celebrities are welcomed on a traditional red carpet, so they planned to wear the best outfits and show themself as perfect couples. Join and play this new game! Have fun!

games.name: Drink Drive
games.description: Drink Drive is a thrilling casual dodge-and-survive 2D pixel game where players control a speeding car on a dark highway. Your goal? Dodge the falling alcohol bottles and test your reflexes to survive as long as possible!

games.description: Go into the mines and collect rare earth minerals! Create improved tools from new materials. The lower you go, the more valuable the resources. Find the rarest materials.

games.name: Celebrity Spring Manicure Design
games.description: Step into the glamour of &amp;lsquo;Celebrity Spring Manicure Design&amp;rsquo;! Explore a world of trendy nail art, vibrant colors, and chic designs. Join celebrities in setting the trend for spring nails. Elevate your style with creative manicures, from floral elegance to modern motifs. Immerse yourself in the art of nail fashion and transform your fingertips into a canvas of spring-inspired beauty. Express your unique style, celebrate the season, and make your nails a fashion statement with Celebrity Spring Manicure Design!

games.name: Makeup Trends: Then And Now
games.description: Step into the exciting world of makeup transformations with TikTok Trends: Makeup Then And Now! Join influencer Kiki as you explore the evolution of beauty trends from the early 2000s to 2024. Experiment with y2k-VSCO and emo-euphoria dark looks, mixing vibrant eyeshadows, bold lip colors, and edgy styles. Customize unique hairstyles and accessories to complete your makeup looks. With endless possibilities to mix and match, become a beauty trendsetter in this fun and engaging game for girls.
games.instructions: Use your mouse to play the game on a desktop tap to play on mobile devices

games.name: Stunt Sprunki
games.description: Play this cute arcade game and test all your skills to complete every level! You&amp;rsquo;ll need strong nerves and great precision to guide Sprunki through the challenges ahead. As you progress, the difficulty increases, and sometimes you&amp;rsquo;ll have to retry a level multiple times before completing your mission. How to Play: Your main goal is to collect all the stars to finish each level. Guide Sprunki through the hoops without crashing! Keep an eye on your fuel bar&amp;mdash;sometimes you&amp;rsquo;ll need to refill it by collecting fuel barrels. Are you ready to fly with Sprunki?
games.instructions: just one click to play

games.name: Parking Frenzy
games.description: Welcome to Parking Frenzy, the ultimate test of precision, planning, and timing! Forget everything you know about driving simulators&amp;mdash;this game doesn&amp;rsquo;t need pedals, steering wheels, or complicated controls. Just swipe your finger, draw the perfect path, and let your car glide into the parking spot. With a stylish 3D look, dynamic environments, and intuitive gameplay, Parking Frenzy delivers a uniquely satisfying experience that&amp;rsquo;s easy to play and hard to master.
games.instructions: mouse only

games.name: Impostor Among Space
games.description: Impostor Among Space is a thrilling single-player stealth game where you play as the Impostor aboard a spaceship full of unsuspecting AI crewmates. Your mission? Eliminate them one by one, sabotage critical systems, and avoid detection at all costs. Use vents to sneak around, trigger fake emergencies to lure crewmates, and strike when no one is watching. But be careful&amp;mdash;the AI crewmates are always watching, and if they suspect you, it&amp;rsquo;s game over. Can you outsmart the crew and take control of the ship?
games.instructions: mouse only

games.name: Space Drift
games.description: Space Drift is an exciting hyper-casual game where players control a spaceship drifting through an asteroid field. Navigate skillfully, avoid obstacles, and collect power-ups to survive as long as possible. With smooth touch controls and dynamic gameplay, Space Drift offers an addictive challenge for players of all ages!

You can control your car as a driver and get into someones car as a passenger. There are also places on the map where you can call a helicopter, as well as some garages to repair cars.

Put your problem-solving skills to the test in Wood Screw , an addictive physics-based puzzle game that challenges your logic and precision! Your goal? Unscrew and remove bolts strategically to make wooden plates fall, clearing the board in the most efficient way possible. With realistic screw mechanics, intuitive touch controls, and engaging puzzle levels, Wood Screw offers a unique blend of logic, strategy, and relaxation. As the levels progress, the complexity of bolt placements will push your mind to the limit! Can you unscrew your way to victory and master the mechanics of this

Inspired by the warmth of natural wood, WOODY helps you unwind, relieve stress, and foster positive social interactions. Relax and recharge anytime with this soothing, free puzzle.

Your mission is to unscrew the bolts in the correct order, solve mechanical puzzles, and unleash the beast. Each level brings a new challenge, testing your logic, strategy, and problem-solving skills. Are you smart enough to figure out the right moves and complete the ultimate screw puzzle adventure?

games.name: Memory Match Lite

games.name: Skybound Adventure
games.description: Steps to Play: Tap to Ascend: To make the balloon rise, tap the left mouse button. Each tap will give your balloon a gentle boost upward. Descending: The balloon will automatically start descending when youre not tapping the left mouse button. Use this to control your descent carefully. Avoid Obstacles: In the game, you will encounter mountain-like obstacles. Maneuver your balloon carefully to avoid crashing into them, or its game over. Collect Red Flags: On each mountain, there will be a red flag, collecting which will earn you points. Each flag will give you 10 points. All the best! Enjoy the thrill of flying.
games.instructions: Tap Mouse Left Button

games.name: Brick Rush 3D
games.description: In the Brick Rush 3D, bridges are built and passed quickly on tracks. Collect bricks to build strong and stable bridges. Race and try to reach the finish line. Keep collecting bricks and materials to make your bridge as long as possible. Make better the bridge, the better your chances to race successfully.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Ash Hidden Objects
games.description: Today in this game your task is to help the funny Ash and pikachu to find the hidden objects. After entering one of the levels you have to find all the hidden objects. The names of the items you need to find will appear on the left side. You need to concentrate well and find all the objects. You have to watch the time, because if it runs out it will be game over. Try to get the maximum points and three stars in every level.
games.instructions: Click with your mouse or tap on the screen to find the objects

games.name: Gorilla Multiplayer
games.description: Gorilla Multiplayer Unleash your inner primate in Gorilla Multiplayer, an exhilarating online adventure! Join players worldwide in dynamic, fast-paced environments where agility, strategy, and teamwork reign supreme. Climb, swing, and jump your way through challenging terrains, all while competing or collaborating with friends. With customizable avatars, thrilling game modes, and a lively community, the jungle has never been this fun. Are you ready to go bananas?
games.instructions: On PC Use the Arrow Keys to move your gorilla Control the camera and aim with the Mouse On Mobile Use the on-screen Joystick to move Tap the Jump Button to leap into action

games.name: Skibidi Toilet GT Drag Championship
games.description: Skibidi Toilet GT Drag Championship is an adrenaline-pumping drag racing game where Skibidi Toilet competes in high-speed, head-to-head races against fierce opponents. The game challenges players to master perfect gear shifts, use nitro boosts strategically, and fine-tune their racing skills to dominate the championship. With a variety of powerful GT cars to unlock and upgrade, players must push their machines to the limit in order to claim the title of the fastest racer on the track.

games.description: Become the Ultimate Archer in Bow Masters Arena! Are you ready to test your archery skills and compete against AI archers? Train hard, master your shots, and enter thrilling battles against AI-controlled opponents to prove you are the best archer! How to Play? Train Your Skills &amp;ndash; Perfect your aim and timing in practice mode. Compete in AI Tournaments &amp;ndash; Face off against intelligent AI archers in high-stakes duels. Unlock Powerful Bows &amp;ndash; Upgrade your weapons for more accuracy and strength.

games.name: Gravity Box
games.description: Gravity Box is an exciting online physics-based game where you control a box using gravity to navigate through challenging levels. Your goal is to make the box move upstairs by flipping gravity at the right moments. Avoid obstacles, time your moves perfectly, and reach the top without falling! With simple controls but tricky mechanics, Gravity Box will test your precision and timing skills. Can you master gravity and guide the box to victory?

games.name: Sprunki Horror Version Dark
games.description: The world of the Sprunki characters has turned into a terrifying place, with everything scattered and surrounded by darkness and blood. Be very careful and reach the portal safely.

games.name: Cat Chaos Simulator

Match, crush, and smush your way through hundreds of levels as you embark on a journey full of strategic twists and tasty rewards. To save the Candy Kingdom from running out of sweetness by completing puzzles and unlocking new areas. With stunning visuals, charming characters

Guide your jelly character as it races down a 3D track. Surpass the target number of people in each stage time and you will move on.

games.name: Territory.io
games.description: Territory.io is an exciting territory capture game where players compete to control the largest area of the map. Features: &amp;bull; Capture territory by creating loops with your trail &amp;bull; Compete against AI opponents for dominance &amp;bull; Collect power-ups for special abilities &amp;bull; Simple controls: use WASD or arrow keys to move &amp;bull; Real-time leaderboard shows whos winning &amp;bull; Fast-paced gameplay with strategic elements Can you become the territory master? Play now and claim your space!

games.name: Tetris Hint
games.description: Tetris Hint is an engaging casual game where falling blocks challenge your strategy and quick thinking! Place the blocks into empty spaces, complete full lines to clear them, and rack up points. Build combos by clearing multiple lines in a row and aim for the highest score. Inspired by the iconic classic Tetris, this game combines timeless gameplay with vibrant graphics and captivating animations. Perfect for players of all ages, it offers a fun and exciting experience every time. Get ready to test your skills and have a blast!

games.name: Skibidi Toilet Cross The Road
games.description: Embark on a wild adventure with Skibidi Toilet Cross the Road! The Skibidi Toilet is stranded in the middle of a mysterious forest, and it needs to get to the other side of the road. But beware! The path is full of tricky rivers, fallen logs, and wild creatures lurking in the trees. Jump over rushing streams, dodge rocks, and avoid getting caught by mischievous forest critters. Each step takes you closer to the goal, but the forest is full of surprises! Can the Skibidi Toilet conquer the wilderness and make it to the other side? The Skibidi beat never stops, so keep dancing and watch out for the next challenge!

Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of anarchy and freedom, where medieval epics are intertwined with daring punk rock. Dress up the girls in black leather dresses decorated with spikes and rivets, and emphasize their uniqueness with bright accents. Create hairstyles that will amaze, from bright spiky hair to braided braids framed by chains and flowers. Dont forget about makeup - bright lips, bold shadows and provocative piercings will make each of the heroines real style icons. Unleash your imagination by creating images full of energy and rebellion!

With intense competition, realistic physics, and breathtaking visuals, this game delivers an adrenaline-fueled experience like no other. Realistic Formula Racing Experience GT Formula Championship is designed to immerse players in the world of professional Formula racing. Every detail, from the aerodynamics of the cars to the track surface, has been meticulously crafted to provid

games.name: Survival Race
games.description: Survival Race is a high-speed battle for survival in a hexagonal arena. Each tile collapses as you drive over it, turning the race into a test of agility and strategy. Stay in the arena by making sharp turns, well-timed jumps, and calculated moves. Knock opponents off the platform into hazardous terrain like water, lava, or acid. Win golden crowns for each eliminated rival, collect coins, and pull off stunts to unlock new cars. The higher your rank, the tougher the competition&amp;mdash;only the best can dominate the arena!
games.instructions: Navigate your car skillfully avoiding gaps and outmaneuvering rivals to claim victory Collect coins smash opponents and perform stunts to complete challenges and unlock better vehicles

games.description: Ninja Escape is an action-packed game where you dodge obstacles and jump across endless platforms. Collect coins, avoid deadly blades, and test your reflexes as you aim for the highest score. With addictive gameplay and dynamic challenges, can you master the art of the ultimate ninja escape?
